title: MAD SPOILERS Audio rip of 30
wikitext:
[]: [MAD SPOILERS] Audio-rip of 3.0             Quote Post by KnifeEyeAttack » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:25 pm [s:231wxijb]Not sure if anyone has posted this on EGF yet, but I found a complete audio rip of 3.0 loating around for anyone that is interested in/able to pick apart some of the dialogue to whatever ends. Not a lot of use to me other than getting a glimpse at some of the OST (admittedly in incredibly low quality), but others might be more interested. [/s:231wxijb] Edit: Well, I obviously haven't had enough coffee today and completely neglected the fact that this forum has rules. But yeah, like esselfortium and Xard pointed out, the rip is out there for those who want to find it and probably originated from here anyway...

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:27 pm *lowers volume, scrolls screen, braces for screamer* Didn't work at first...but yeah, we're good.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:35 pm Somebody posted it earlier, and it was removed for breaking the forum rules against linking to copyrighted content. People who want it will find it regardless.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:35 pm In the first minutes there's something like someone singing in background, is this even a Japanese cinema? It seems that it stopped before the end of the preview scene though.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:38 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: In the first minutes there's something like someone singing in background, is this even a Japanese cinema? It seems that it stopped before the end of the preview scene though.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:45 pm Xard wrote: Must be all those dirty immigrants soiling good Japanese territory/culture

[]:             Quote Post by dhazard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 11:01 pm can someone pm me with the link?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Nov 18, 2012 11:49 pm Just go to /a/ on 4chan and it's at the beginning of each Eva thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Nov 19, 2012 10:32 am KAWORU-KUN!!!!! *splat*

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Nov 19, 2012 10:49 am Kaworu Nagisa wrote: It's not your fault

[]:             Quote Post by Helius » Mon Nov 19, 2012 11:28 am I do hope someone's gonna sub it.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Nov 19, 2012 2:22 pm Listening to this & knowing what events transpire in the film I have to say 3.0 sounds remarkably focused. I love the previous two Rebuild films - 2.0 a great deal more than the elaborate re-edit 1.0 is - but both films were a bit all over the place. The biggest cinematic problem with the Rebuild films in my eyes have always been the Angels who work wonders for episodic television but in the films can often be disruptive to the narrative. 3.0 sounds (repeat SOUNDS) like the first half hour is overly busy but then cools down into a solid character drama with no random action scenes or distracting (but awesome) cheerful music to remove viewers from the drama and all leads up to one final battle sequence. Can't wait to see the film proper. Also, it's been YEARS since I last watched Nadia but am I correct in thinking that most of the BG music is a lift from The Secret of Blue Water?

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Nov 19, 2012 9:37 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Also, it's been YEARS since I last watched Nadia but am I correct in thinking that most of the BG music is a lift from The Secret of Blue Water?

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Tue Nov 20, 2012 6:43 pm How does 105 minutes magic into 95? Did he turn the cam off?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 20, 2012 6:49 pm Clover wrote: How does 105 minutes magic into 95? Did he turn the cam off?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 21, 2012 3:16 pm For those who were curious, Mari sings this song in Q: You're not alone (Hitori jaa nai no) , another song from the 70s. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eAXxNa3sN44 Guess they gotta have her sing something other than 365 Step March again.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Nov 23, 2012 11:59 am Just got around to listen to it in full. Ouch. Ouch, just OUCH. The Music makes it SO, SO much worse. As does Ogata's voice acting. It's like they asked themselves "Just how much depressing piano music can we squeeze into 106 minutes?" First, there's "Ode to Joy", then, BABUM. "God's wrath" and then there's that moment of silence where all the battle sounds stop and all we hear is Shinji and Kaworu, the former being appropiately horrified and guilt-stricken about the whole "accidentaly blew the world up once again" thing... and THEN there's that horrible, horrible SPLOTCH soundeffect. *shivers*
